fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the production order routing.
This field is filled in automatically by the system
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the operation to which this entry refers.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the tool.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that the comment refers to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the status of the production order that this routing tool is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production order number that the routing tool is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Refers to the routing number that is related to the production order line that uses the routing tool.
The field contains a zero when the routing line is related to a family order where more production order lines share the same routing.
